5 	The Pixel
GDPR & FB Ad Term Compliance
Framework Foundations
How to Make Your Funnels Compliant to
New FB Terms
IMPORTANT:
For those of you targeting the EU: You MUST ask for permission BEFORE you can
pixel a user on your funnels (see instructions and plugins below that can be used)
AND use HTTPS
For those of you not targeting EU: You MUST tell people that they are being tracked
and have privacy policy (but you can pixel them regardless if they give permission)
For the Rapid Fire Testing using lead ads: If you intend on using the lead data
collected from your rapid fire round are targeting the EU you MUST use a double opt-
in with your email CRM system.
Mark As Complete
